TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_imuy
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: tangi titaanku 'nay wani qibyabasay qibyabasay lazat a yau ta taizaan u.
S.PHON: taŋi titaanku ʔnaj wani qiβjaβasaj qiβjaβasaj raz~rat a jau ta taiz~raan u.
S.FORM: tangi titaanku 'nay wani qibyabasay qibyabasay lazat a yau ta taizaan u.
S.PHON: taŋi titaanku ʔnaj wani qiβjaβasaj qiβjaβasaj raz~rat a jau ta taiz~raan u.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛看到採芭樂的人在那邊.
I just saw a person who was picking guavas somewhere.

S.FORM: ta pa tabunguRanna na tabunguRanna na byabas a yau qi qibyabas 'nay.
S.PHON: ta pa taβuŋuʁanna na taβuŋuʁanna na βjaβas a jau qi qiβjaβas ʔnaj.
S.FORM: ta pa tabunguRanna na tabunguRanna na byabas a yau qi qibyabas 'nay.
S.PHON: ta pa taβuŋuʁanna na taβuŋuʁanna na βjaβas a jau qi qiβjaβas ʔnaj.

S.FORM: lazat 'nay nani kyalaannati 'nay byabas a yau.
S.PHON: raz~rat ʔnaj nani kjaraannati ʔnaj βjaβas a jau.
S.FORM: lazat 'nay nani kyalaannati 'nay byabas a yau.
S.PHON: raz~rat ʔnaj nani kjaraannati ʔnaj βjaβas a jau.

S.FORM: pizianna ta qibian nani.
S.PHON: piz~rianna ta qiβian nani.
S.FORM: pizianna ta qibian nani.
S.PHON: piz~rianna ta qiβian nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他(把芭樂)放在大籃子裡.
He put (them) in a big basket.

S.TRANSL: He put in a big basket.

S.FORM: alaanna pun kmyala na alaannati na.
S.PHON: araanna pun kmjara na araannati na.
S.FORM: alaanna pun kmyala na alaannati na.
S.PHON: araanna pun kmjara na araannati na.

S.FORM: sunis a yau mzaqis pa zaqis ta zitinsyaan 'nay nikyalaan na tamana tu byabas tabunguRan na paRin.
S.PHON: sunis a jau mz~raqis pa z~raqis ta z~ritinsjaan ʔnaj nikjaraan na tamana tu βjaβas taβuŋuʁan na paʁin.
S.FORM: sunis a yau mzaqis pa zaqis ta zitinsyaan 'nay nikyalaan na tamana tu byabas tabunguRan na paRin.
S.PHON: sunis a jau mz~raqis pa z~raqis ta z~ritinsjaan ʔnaj nikjaraan na tamana tu βjaβas taβuŋuʁan na paʁin.
S.TRANSL: 把那些他爸爸在樹幹那邊撿的芭樂放在腳踏車上.
He put onto the bicycle the guavas picked by his father around the trunk.

S.FORM: 'nay alaanna patanan nani tangi nani suRawti tapatazan na lazan 'nay sunis a yau.
S.PHON: ʔnaj araanna patanan nani taŋi nani suʁawti tapataz~ran na raz~ran ʔnaj sunis a jau.
S.FORM: 'nay alaanna patanan nani tangi nani suRawti tapatazan na lazan 'nay sunis a yau.
S.PHON: ʔnaj araanna patanan nani taŋi nani suʁawti tapataz~ran na raz~ran ʔnaj sunis a jau.

S.FORM: mluzitti zapan na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: mruz~ritti z~rapan na sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: mluzitti zapan na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: mruz~ritti z~rapan na sunis a jau nani.

S.FORM: yauti ya kaputna mangmu timaizipna ni kmyala tu niqatabuqanna na byabas a yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jauti ja kaputna maŋmu timaiz~ripna ni kmjara tu niqataβuqanna na βjaβas a jau taraz~ranan.
S.FORM: yauti ya kaputna mangmu timaizipna ni kmyala tu niqatabuqanna na byabas a yau talazanan.
S.PHON: jauti ja kaputna maŋmu timaiz~ripna ni kmjara tu niqataβuqanna na βjaβas a jau taraz~ranan.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友來幫他撿起散落一地的芭樂.
His friends came to help him pick up the guavas that were scattered all over the road.

S.FORM: qalisinpuannati ta qibian 'nay 'nay ta 'nay byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: qarisinpuannati ta qiβian ʔnaj ʔnaj ta ʔnaj βjaβas a jau nani.
S.FORM: qalisinpuannati ta qibian 'nay 'nay ta 'nay byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: qarisinpuannati ta qiβian ʔnaj ʔnaj ta ʔnaj βjaβas a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們把芭樂集中放在籃子裡.
They put the guavas into the basket.

S.FORM: pazaqisanna uman.
S.PHON: paz~raqisanna uman.
S.FORM: pazaqisanna uman.
S.PHON: paz~raqisanna uman.
S.TRANSL: 他們再把芭樂放在腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: They put (the guavas onto the bicycle) again.

S.FORM: tmanan.
S.PHON: tmanan.
S.FORM: tmanan.
S.PHON: tmanan.

S.FORM: kalingunannati ya 'nay qubuna na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: kariŋunannati ja ʔnaj quβuna na sunis a jau.
S.FORM: kalingunannati ya 'nay qubuna na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: kariŋunannati ja ʔnaj quβuna na sunis a jau.

S.FORM: alaan na kaputna bula tu qubu 'nay kaputna 'nay msuRaway sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: araan na kaputna βura tu quβu ʔnaj kaputna ʔnaj msuʁawaj sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: alaan na kaputna bula tu qubu 'nay kaputna 'nay msuRaway sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: araan na kaputna βura tu quβu ʔnaj kaputna ʔnaj msuʁawaj sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友把帽子拿給那個跌倒的小孩.
His friends gave the hat to the child who fell.

S.FORM: wiyati tmanan sunis a yau.
S.PHON: wijati tmanan sunis a jau.
S.FORM: wiyati tmanan sunis a yau.
S.PHON: wijati tmanan sunis a jau.

S.FORM: yauti 'nay kintuluay yauti qman tu byabas a yau.
S.PHON: jauti ʔnaj kinturuaj jauti qman tu βjaβas a jau.
S.FORM: yauti 'nay kintuluay yauti qman tu byabas a yau.
S.PHON: jauti ʔnaj kinturuaj jauti qman tu βjaβas a jau.
S.TRANSL: There were three people who were eating guavas.

S.FORM: wiyati pasazi ta tatibuR sayza smaqay 'nay kintuluay sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati pasaz~ri ta tatiβuʁ sajz~ra smaqaj ʔnaj kinturuaj sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: wiyati pasazi ta tatibuR sayza smaqay 'nay kintuluay sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati pasaz~ri ta tatiβuʁ sajz~ra smaqaj ʔnaj kinturuaj sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: The three children went towards the south.

S.FORM: tmananti 'nay sunis 'nay mniz.
S.PHON: tmananti ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj mniz~r.
S.FORM: tmananti 'nay sunis 'nay mniz.
S.PHON: tmananti ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj mniz~r.

S.FORM: tu maseqti ta izaan.
S.PHON: tu masəqti ta iz~raan.
S.FORM: tu maseqti ta izaan.
S.PHON: tu masəqti ta iz~raan.

S.FORM: talepawanna sayza 'nay sunis 'nay Raynguankuti.
S.PHON: tarəpawanna sajz~ra ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj ʁajŋuankuti.
S.FORM: talepawanna sayza 'nay sunis 'nay Raynguankuti.
S.PHON: tarəpawanna sajz~ra ʔnaj sunis ʔnaj ʁajŋuankuti.
S.TRANSL: 或許到家裡. 我不知道.
Perhaps to their home. I don't know.

S.FORM: maiti nayau ma sikawmaan.
S.PHON: maiti najau ma sikawmaan.
S.FORM: maiti nayau ma sikawmaan.
S.PHON: maiti najau ma sikawmaan.

S.FORM: meiyou la.
S.PHON: məij*u ra.
S.FORM: meiyou la.
S.PHON: məij*u ra.
